name: finish-task
description: Finish coding work end-to-end after implementation is believed complete: validate evidence, review the diff, use magi/counsel and complexity-guard, check architecture/philosophy alignment, capture or attach screenshots for UI work, then deliver through a PR, guarded default-branch commit, or worktree merge based on repository metadata. Use when the user says finish, wrap up, ship it, make a PR, create/update the PR, merge this worktree into the default branch, commit directly to the default branch, or asks for a task completion flow.
